review_title: Bookmark Is Awesome!
description: I am helping people that are not tech savvy claim their footprints on the internet.
author: Sam L.
pros: I like that is affordable and has ease of use. I like that there are tips and online trainings to help grow the business.
cons: I wish it was more customizable. The image editing is not that great when trying to have an image fit better. I also wish it looked better on mobile.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Bookmark is good start for non tech savvy people
description: Book.ark is good for beginners that need help building their domain and it's design. It's not to hard to use, but some features can give you trouble when using them.
author: Marquita R.
pros: I like the drag and drop feature, it does make things really easy. Even though you can't really create your own layout from scratch, you are able to quickly create a design that works in a short period of time.
cons: Some features were giving me trouble like; the blog function. This is big for out company because through our monthly subscription you get to visit our blog page and get tips and lessons, but with this giving us such a time we weren't always able to have this feature up to date or to our liking.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Take the money and run!
description: Seemed okay at first but now I HATE working with them.
author: Matthew F.
pros: Easy to visually set up the website but that's about it.
cons: You can't upload your blogs and keep the same url, if you pay for their email or it is included in the plan they won't help you with setup, you can't take payment over the phone effectively, customer support just refers you to online irrelevant guides...I don't think they know their own system. I was promised a google credit that they didn't honor. I move to bookmark for more simplicity but since I've moved my SEO has tanked, my sales have struggled, and all I get from bookmark are shrugs. I asked what it would take to get a refund since I paid for a year in advance and they told me there are no refunds. I will appeal to ecwid who they build their system on and hopefully they will be more reasonable.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: An Excellent Alternative to WordPress and Other Website Builders
description: Overall, I am very pleased with Bookmark. You get a lot for a very reasonable amount of money. It allows just the right amount of backend customization, yet not so much that it becomes a burden for users who don't want to get bogged down with features they don't understand.
author: Sue B.
pros: I really like how easy Bookmark is to use. It really has all the features I look for in a website builder, without a lot of the headaches people can run into when they use WordPress. I like to use it to build websites for my small business clients who are looking for a dependable website that looks beautiful, but who may not be tech savvy enough to want to deal with learning WordPress.
cons: The AI builder in Bookmark is fun to use, but I think it could do more to scrape current sites and pull in images that are relevant to my client's current web assets. The AI builder is a great way to quickly build a great looking and functional demo site, but I don't really understand how it is actually using AI. It kind of seems slightly gimmicky in that respect. That said, I still think the AI builder is time saving feature and it is worth using it to spin up a quick website.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: How did I go so long without this product
description: I have a large distributed web with multiple subscription sites, clients, and marketing pages. Bookmarks helps me streamline and bring all that in under control. They are wonderful at this point to work with and I don't forsee that their committment to their product is going to change. I'm happy to have found them.
author: Pamela B.
pros: Quick and easy framework setup using the digital assistant helps me get the website off and running and allows me to focus on the customer and their content.
cons: Some work still needs to be done on the blog feature, but the websites and ecommerce is a grand slam.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Bookmark makes website creation, migration and find tuning easy!
author: Jason C.
pros: Since migrating the website away from Wix the speed of our website on the Bookmark platform has increased dramatically. Bookmark is a very handy tool for creating a website and has increased the performance of our site immediately. Truly excellent service and product.
cons: At first the modules were a bit tricky to get used to while initially customizing the site. However, using the video tutorials I was able to figure most of it out on my own.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Not synced with PaydPro Plus
description: It's extremely hard to keep my instore inventory synced with what is online. I am considering another platform.
author: Sherry F.
pros: Ease of use and pricing is affordable. Those are positive features.
cons: I was told before I adopted the platform that it would be integrated with Moneris Getpayd by the end of 2020 or the first quarter of 2021 at the latest. This has not happened and I am told there is no definitive date. I'm disappointed because my decision to adopt was based on this integration.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Setting up my website
description: I am very pleased to have my site up and running
author: Robert M.
pros: The possibility to present my products. Had a lot of help from the customer support. Not that easy to get going but with some help I got there
cons: Not to user friendly but after having some help I got what I needed.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great AI website builder with lots of potential
description: Overall I love the platform and its potential. It is lacking in a few features right now because it's a bit newer than other platforms on the market; however Bookmark is prioritizing and releasing more functionality all the time. In a few months I believe this will be one of the top website builders out there.
author: Wendy N.
pros: I love how quick it is to get a shell of a website up and running, ready for editing. I can use the AI builder to pick an industry and my style, then it creates a fully functional website in a couple minutes. Of course then you can edit it to match your color scheme and update your content to make it reflect your own brand, which will take some time of course. But getting to the point where you can start editing is minutes vs. hours with some other website builders. Also I like how simple yet powerful the website editor is. It's super easy to add modules and entire pre-built content areas which you can then customize further. Also it's very touch-screen friendly. Some other builder tools I'v used don't work at all when using touch screens. Also their sites are hosted on Amazon's AWS cloud servers, which are lightning fast.
cons: Currently it's missing some key functionality that I know they are working on and will be added soon. But at the moment their blog features are lacking. There isn't a way to save a blog post layout and use it as a template going forward for future blog posts. You have to recreate each post from scratch. Also no way to dynamically display the last n blog posts, for example to display a blog feed on your home page. You currently have to build that manually. Functionality is supposedly being built to address these issues soon.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Amazing customer service, easy to use, incredible output
description: Helped me design a website lickety split, great imagery, great start to build on. love that we can add ecommerce on when it is time. I've already recommended the product to other friends I have that are starting their own businesses too.
author: Michelle A.
pros: Pretty simple to use with drag and drop modules. I liked that it generated as many different websites as I could imagine and saved them all so I could go back and pick and choose. The images are super impactful and I LOVE that they are all royalty free. Very cool that they have an add a blog option. The support is AMAZING!!! As easy as it is to use, it takes some time to ramp up on how it works and the support is right there for you. They are really patient and helpful and I used a lot of their how to guides.
cons: There are different types of 'focuses' which are kind of like templates and it looks like the generated websites combine them in the same manner. It would be awesome if I could pick and choose the focus formats that I wanted. Stronger blog capabilities like commenting and sharing would make it perfect!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Flexible, Fast, and Friggin' Awesome
author: Sebastian B.
pros: From the first step of creating a new site to the final touches, Bookmark is by far the most efficient and quick builder I have used to date. And not to mention the most fun. The different creation options are a great option too. Some more main features that I love to use, and that differentiate Bookmark from other builders: - Super quick addition of 'focus' page sections - Ability to edit text and images so quickly - Quick access to commercial, free, use HQ stock photos within builder - add lots of images via search to library - Client sub-accounts with the Agency plan - Different ability to create a new version on AI site when you make a new site, if the first version isn't what you envisioned you can just click "creat" again and it will change up quite a bit! - Plain fast speed of literally everything - Amazing for 1 pager fixed menu scroll landing page sites for Google Ads, specific client service, opt-in lead gen, etc. - Able to throw together site mockups for clients within 5 minutes.. talk about efficient - Quick addition and editing of new pages, menu, styling, etc. etc. (everything is fast) Get Bookmark.com now if you are considering it!
cons: Here are some very specific things, not necessarily even a worry for most people but worth mentioning, for niche use cases. These are more along the line of suggestions, and maybe even some of these things are on the development forecast: - built-in form doesn't have really any flexibility (But it still does work well). Also my form keyword attribution tracking software code doesn't seem to detect it.. maybe I'm just missing something :)) - keep in mind the images needed for parralax header sections seem to always need to be super high quality. If not it is very easy for them to show up as pixely or grainy. Imagery is one main thing about websites so just make sure you have the right images and quality (Although It is very easy to use the free commercial use photos provided by Bookmark and integrated Pixabay) - ability to edit mobile view would be nice, it almost always works great and you can preview it but when you adjust spacers etc. sometimes it isn't perfect. Doesn't really come up often though!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Getting the benefits of using AI for web design
description: My overall experience is very positive. Primarily because of the support!
author: Nigel G.
pros: I advise leading AI companies on algorithm development and deployment. So was naturally attracted to an AI tool to assist in matters more web related. The software is intuitive and easy to use...but the major advantage of the software is the support, which is seond-to-none! Exceptional!
cons: There will always be trade-offs between ease of use and funtionality, so sometimes we hit the boundaries/parameters of what is possible. Particularly as we intergrate Bookmark with some other leading edge software applications.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Bookmark - Quick Web Presence | Awesome Customer Service
author: Nicholas R.
pros: Initially i was a little apprehensive about using the software. I initially thought the AI was more of a gimmick, but I was wrong. Bookmark gives the opportunity to not only get you kicked off in the right direction but also gives the user complete customization.
cons: It doesn't seem like it has a strong user base on youtube or in forums but the team at Bookmark has been there every step of the way.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: It's a great platform for anyone with little knowledge to make great websites
description: I really like the idea of using AI to build fully functional websites in a very short time and it helps you create websites are mobile optimized
author: Mahdi B.
pros: Ease of use, mobile compatible websites, customer support
cons: Nothing in particular, the only thing I can say I hope was easier to install some custome icons like Facebook messanger
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Awesome for B2C
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Selling options & multi-payment gateways
cons: drug and play, the integrations are​ really cool
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Easy to create websites for my clients
author: Daniel V.
pros: Love the way bookmark creates website based on certain criteria, and how easy is to customise them.
cons: Lack of integrations with other platforms, like CRMs and exporting posibilities.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Not Impressed
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The only feature I truly enjoyed with regard to this software was the AI web builder.
cons: Highly cumbersome to use, lack of instruction and non-user friendly.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Simple, easy to use website builder
description: It's definitely a product I would and do recommend. Especially good for startups and small companies.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: When we work with clients, this is a product I constantly recommend. It's simple to use, with multiple options to view. You can pick and choose between different visuals, with no limit. You also have access to royalty free images, to help keep your budget within reason.
cons: A very small issue, but most of the features you have to find and learn how to use on your own. However, all are clearly marked.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Best Deal Purchased...
author: MuQuiter B.
pros: The AI feature helped create a beautiful website for my brand. Its ease of use and ability to customize makes it easy for me to navigate.
cons: Understanding where certain elements are located within the menus was tricky at first.
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

review_title: Great Deal!
description: Very pleased to have this tool in my arsenal! Very quick to get started and easy to pass websites over to the client!
author: kevin M.
pros: The agency portion of Bookmark and training that comes with it! Very insightful information and not to mention a great platform for my older clients who aren't too tech saavy!
cons: Im used to Wordpress and its limitless features. Bookmark is a young platform so I hope to grow with it!
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Bookmark AI web design
description: Ease of use was great; however it lacks the ability to get into the code and do something powerful with it. Like I said it’s great for like a service business brochure style website. It’s AI is more of an algorithm they use to come up with random layouts to start with. It still needs work, but would work for the average Joe. They really need to work on their customer service though is my biggest complaint.
author: Ronnie S.
pros: It makes the process of building a brochure style site a breeze. The AI as it’s called will come up with a random style layout for you to start with.
cons: My biggest complaint is the customer service is a 9-5 position, so you really can’t rely on them even when they are in the office it takes them forever to respond back. As far as being an online hosting business they should be 24 x7 which they lack. Most other big name hosting providers are 24 x 7
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Best Website Builder I've Ever Used
author: Rich P.
pros: I've used a number of website builders before but this is the best yet. The AI website builder goes beyond just giving you a nice template, but even builds the thing for you!
cons: They integrate with POWR, which is cool, but it'd be nice if some of those widgets - like a countdown - were independently coded by Bookmark so you could get full functionality without POWR's branding.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Overall it was great. I did have some issues, but CSR helped out a lot!
description: I was able to create two websites and reserve the domains, but I didn't have to launch both sites at the same time. I also learned a little more about web design.
author: Evon R.
pros: I like how the team is there to help you on site when you have problems, and I like the low cost of it. I also like how you can build as many websites as you want or need.
cons: The only thing is that sometimes I needed help and I had to wait for hours for a reply lol But, once I got a reply, they helped resolve the issue quickly.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Full marks for Bookmark
description: I'd created a few websites before looking at template-driven page layout products. After having previewed and test-driven a few the one that impressed me most was bookmark.com. I could see how their templates and process were suited to my own needs in a finished page. Once into the content positioning, a design-organizing process I couldn't believe how well it was implementing. I'm driven by design, not code, and using bookmark was completely intuitive which was great because I like to dive in and see the page evolve, and their preview function suited my workflow perfectly. The few times I was stuck for decision, the online help was incredibly responsive, with solutions that worked, and you're dealing with the developers, not just tech support on a script. I've built three pages using different templates, and all function as well as the others. If you need a page, and you're like me, then bookmark it.
author: Rob K.

review_title: Bookmark is a very good software to start any project from scratch.
author: Yan K.
pros: The support team is amazing : if you have any question, doubt, problem etc., the team is here for you. It was very surprising how fast they answer AND resolve your issue. Another good point is the fact that the software is very easy to use : anybody can do it.
cons: Sometimes, there are some issues with one or two functionalities but as I said : the support is here for you (5 min to 30 minutes) and it feels like you never had any issues. Try it and you'll see !
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
